caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, glasses, and a large, silver, conical wig is seated in a studio. He wears headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin torso wearing a black garment. To the right, a vertical yellow banner with the text "LEE" is partially visible. On-screen graphics feature a red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" alongside a microphone icon. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking with a slight smile and shifting his facial expressions. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen, with only minor movements in his head and mouth as he talks.
